lab.title: Lab 01 - Manage Microsoft Entra ID Identities

steps.title: Sign in to Azure Portal
steps.instruction: Sign in to the Azure portal at https://portal.azure.com and dismiss any welcome screens
steps.aiResponse:
Both screenshots confirm successful sign-in. The Azure portal is loaded at `portal.azure.com/#home`, signed in as RudolfZhang@outlook. No welcome dialog appeared that needed dismissing — the portal shows the "Welcome to Azure!" home page with options for Free Trial, Manage Microsoft Entra ID, and Azure for Students.

```
ACTIONS_TAKEN: Navigated to https://portal.azure.com. Portal loaded directly to home page. No welcome dialog or tour appeared to dismiss. Pressed Escape as precaution.
STEP_COMPLETED: YES
ELEMENT_FOUND: YES (portal dashboard loaded successfully)
ELEMENT_DIFFERENT: None
EXTRA_STEPS_NEEDED: None
UNEXPECTED_UI: None
BLOCKING_ISSUES: None
CURRENT_STATE: Azure portal home page displaying "Welcome to Azure!" with three cards: Start with an Azure free trial, Manage Microsoft Entra ID, and Azure for Students. Signed in as RudolfZhang@outlook.
SCREENSHOT_BEFORE: step-1-sign-in-portal-before.png
SCREENSHOT_AFTER: step-1-sign-in-portal-after.png
```

steps.title: Navigate to Microsoft Entra ID
steps.instruction: Search for and select Microsoft Entra ID from the Azure portal
steps.aiResponse:
The Microsoft Entra ID Overview page loaded successfully. I can see the tenant info (名默认目录), Tenant ID, Primary domain (RudolfZhangoutlook.onmicrosoft.com), Users: 1, Groups: 0, and the left nav with Users, Groups, etc.

```
ACTIONS_TAKEN: Searched for "Microsoft Entra ID" using the portal search bar at the top. Clicked the first search result which navigated to the Microsoft Entra ID Overview page.
STEP_COMPLETED: YES
ELEMENT_FOUND: YES (search bar found, "Microsoft Entra ID" appeared in search results)
ELEMENT_DIFFERENT: None
EXTRA_STEPS_NEEDED: None
UNEXPECTED_UI: A "Give feedback to Microsoft" satisfaction survey popup appeared in the top-right corner. It was informational only and did not block any functionality.
BLOCKING_ISSUES: None
CURRENT_STATE: Microsoft Entra ID Overview page showing tenant "默认目录" with Tenant ID, Primary domain (RudolfZhangoutlook.onmicrosoft.com), License: Microsoft Entra ID Free, Users: 1, Groups: 0, Applications: 0, Devices: 0. Left nav shows Users, Groups, External Identities, Roles and administrators, etc.
SCREENSHOT_BEFORE: step-2-navigate-entra-id-before.png
SCREENSHOT_AFTER: step-2-navigate-entra-id-after.png
```

driftIssues.instructionText: Search for and select Microsoft Entra ID from the Azure portal
driftIssues.actualBehavior: A "Give feedback to Microsoft" satisfaction survey popup appeared in the top-right corner. It was informational only and did not block any functionality.
driftIssues.recommendation: Informational UI element - does not affect lab completion

steps.title: Explore Entra ID Tenants
steps.instruction: Select the Overview blade, then click the Manage tenants tab to explore tenant management, then return to Entra ID page
steps.aiResponse:
All three screenshots confirm the step completed successfully:

1. **BEFORE**: Entra ID Overview page showing tenant "默认目录" with Basic information (Tenant ID, Primary domain, License), Users: 1, Groups: 0. The "Manage tenants" button is visible in the toolbar.
2. **Manage tenants**: Clicked "Manage tenants" — navigated to the tenant management view showing "Welcome to Azure!" with the tenant's available options (no additional tenants to manage with this free account).
3. **AFTER**: Successfully navigated back to the Entra ID Overview page, identical to the before state.

```
ACTIONS_TAKEN: Clicked Overview in the left nav (already active). Clicked "Manage tenants" button in the toolbar — navigated to tenant management page showing the current tenant. Then navigated back to Entra ID Overview page.
STEP_COMPLETED: YES
ELEMENT_FOUND: YES (Overview blade, "Manage tenants" button both found and clickable)
ELEMENT_DIFFERENT: None
EXTRA_STEPS_NEEDED: None
UNEXPECTED_UI: None
BLOCKING_ISSUES: None
CURRENT_STATE: Microsoft Entra ID Overview page showing tenant "默认目录", Tenant ID dc57358e-..., Primary domain RudolfZhangoutlook.onmicrosoft.com, License: Microsoft Entra ID Free, Users: 1, Groups: 0, Applications: 0, Devices: 0. Alert about migrating to converged Authentication methods policy visible.
SCREENSHOT_BEFORE: step-3-explore-tenants-before.png
SCREENSHOT_AFTER: step-3-explore-tenants-after.png
```

steps.title: Invite External User

- `az104-tester` (Guest, az104-tester_outl..., Invitation, RudolfZhangoutlook.onmicroso)
- `az104-user1` (Member, az104-user1@Rud...)
- `Zhang Rudolf` (Member, MicrosoftAccount, Invitation)
